Day 1: Water Words – Watch Word Up! Video - Focus: Aqua (Latin for water) & Hydra (Greek for water)
Day 2: Review & Write - Vocabulary Words: aquarium, aqueduct, aquatic, hydrant, dehydrate, hydrogen
Day 3: Game Day! - Play a game on ABCya!
Day 4: Writing Assignment - Write a short story about a thirsty fish who leaves his aquarium to find a fire hydrant.
Day 1: Earth Words – Watch Word Up! Video - Focus: Terra (Latin for earth) & Geo (Greek for earth)
Day 2: Review & Write - Vocabulary Words: territory, terrace, subterranean, geology, geography, geometry
Day 3: Game Day! - Play a game on RoomRecess
Day 4: Writing Assignment - Pretend you are an explorer. Write a journal entry about the geography of a new territory you discovered.
